title: Remove auto-jump code (lines 1551, 1573); replace stale copy (line 1617)
description: Remove auto-jump code that switches panels after starting bulk operations: line 1551 (window.__showPanel('panel-batch')) and line 1573 (window.__showPanel('panel-batch')). Replace stale copy at line 1617 ('Check the individual jobs section below.') with 'See job monitor below.' The operator should stay on the unified panel after starting a bulk run or webhook test.
notes: Auto-jump no longer needed since run actions and job monitor are in the same panel. Toast notification may replace auto-jump for progress visibility.
